result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on the BetRivers PA casino page. The most notable problems involve content clipping on the right side of the viewport, truncated navigation labels, and partially visible game cards that obscure important information.

issues.description: Multiple game card thumbnails in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped on the right edge of the screen. Game titles like 'Magni Pho...' and 'Munc Mi...' are unreadable due to being cut off.
issues.suggestion: If horizontal scrolling is intended, add a visible scroll indicator or arrow. Otherwise, adjust the grid layout to fit within the viewport using responsive CSS (e.g., reduce column count or use flexible widths).

issues.description: The 'Hot Games' navigation tab label is truncated to 'Hot Ga...' in the horizontal navigation bar, making it incomplete and unprofessional.
issues.suggestion: Either shorten the label text, reduce padding, allow the nav bar to scroll horizontally with a clearer affordance, or use icon-only tabs with tooltips on mobile.

issues.description: The third column of game cards across all game sections is only partially visible, providing no clear visual affordance that the rows are horizontally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll hint (e.g., a gradient fade on the right edge or a scroll arrow icon) to communicate that additional content is available via horizontal scroll.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar shows 'POKER' as the active/highlighted tab in orange, but the page content displayed appears to be the Casino home section, creating a mismatch between the active nav state and the visible content.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the active state in the bottom navigation accurately reflects the current page/section being displayed to avoid user confusion.
